case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. MICHAEL A HIATT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-20-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUIS VILLALOBOS. DEFENDANT MICHAEL A. HIATT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE DEFENDANT HAS SET UP A PAYMENT PLAN AND WOULD LIKE A PROGRESS REPORT DATE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
